proposed_concepts.name: ae-cli
proposed_concepts.spec: Top-level CLI class. Parses argv, resolves the active sub-command, and dispatches execution. Constructs all dependencies (engine, writer, resource providers) and injects them into handlers.
proposed_concepts.invariant: Every public sub-command is reachable through this single entry-point; no command bypasses `AeCli` argument parsing.

proposed_concepts.name: codex-exec-generation-engine
proposed_concepts.spec: Orchestrates LLM-driven generation of agentic executable artifacts. Coordinates prompt assembly, inference round-trips via `CodexExecInferenceClient`, and post-processing of model responses into writable files.
proposed_concepts.invariant: All generation passes through this engine; callers never talk to the inference client directly.

proposed_concepts.name: codex-exec-inference-client
proposed_concepts.spec: Thin client responsible for a single concern: sending a prepared prompt to the configured LLM endpoint and returning the raw completion. Holds no generation state.
proposed_concepts.invariant: Stateless per request; carries no prompt-assembly logic.

proposed_concepts.name: safe-file-writer
proposed_concepts.spec: Writes one or more `FileWriteRequest` objects to disk using atomic semantics. Returns `FileWriteResult` per file and a `SafeWriteBatchResult` for batch operations. Respects `SafeWriteOptions` (overwrite policy, dry-run, etc.).
proposed_concepts.invariant: Never silently overwrites an existing file unless the caller explicitly opts in via `SafeWriteOptions`; every write produces a `FileWriteStatus` entry.

proposed_concepts.name: file-write-status
proposed_concepts.spec: Enum encoding the outcome of a single file-write attempt: written, skipped, overwritten, error, etc.
proposed_concepts.invariant: Exhaustive; every possible write outcome maps to exactly one variant.

proposed_concepts.name: safe-write-options
proposed_concepts.spec: Value object bundling write-time policy flags (e.g. `allowOverwrite`, `dryRun`) passed to `SafeFileWriter`.
proposed_concepts.invariant: Immutable after construction; shared across all files in a batch call.

proposed_concepts.name: file-write-request
proposed_concepts.spec: Value object carrying a target path and content blob for a single file to be written by `SafeFileWriter`.
proposed_concepts.invariant: Contains no I/O side-effects; pure data carrier.

proposed_concepts.name: file-write-result
proposed_concepts.spec: Value object returned by `SafeFileWriter` for a single file, containing the resolved path, final `FileWriteStatus`, and optional error message.
proposed_concepts.invariant: Always present for every `FileWriteRequest` submitted, even on failure.

proposed_concepts.name: safe-write-batch-result
proposed_concepts.spec: Aggregates a list of `FileWriteResult` objects from a multi-file `SafeFileWriter` call, providing summary counts (written, skipped, errored).
proposed_concepts.invariant: Count of results equals count of requests; no request is silently dropped.

proposed_concepts.name: embedded-cli-resources
proposed_concepts.spec: Provides access to static assets (prompts, schemas, config stubs) compiled into the CLI binary. Acts as a registry for all embedded byte/string resources.
proposed_concepts.invariant: Read-only at runtime; contents are fixed at compile time.

proposed_concepts.name: embedded-document-store
proposed_concepts.spec: Key/content store backed by embedded binary data. Supports lookup of named documents (e.g. reference docs, spec templates) without filesystem access.
proposed_concepts.invariant: All keys are known at compile time; lookup of an unknown key returns null or throws — never creates new entries.

proposed_concepts.name: embedded-skill-template-provider
proposed_concepts.spec: Implements the skill-template provider interface using templates bundled inside the binary via `EmbeddedCliResources`.
proposed_concepts.invariant: Requires no filesystem path; always available regardless of working directory.

proposed_concepts.name: file-skill-template-provider
proposed_concepts.spec: Implements the skill-template provider interface by reading `.yaml` template files from a configurable directory on disk. Enables user-supplied or project-local overrides of built-in templates.
proposed_concepts.invariant: Falls back gracefully (error or null) if the configured path does not exist; does not fall through to the embedded provider.

proposed_concepts.name: spec-export-result
proposed_concepts.spec: Value object capturing the output of the `exportSpec` operation: exported file paths, serialized spec content, and any warnings encountered during export.
proposed_concepts.invariant: Immutable after construction; represents a completed (possibly partial) export snapshot.

proposed_concepts.name: json-first-output
proposed_concepts.spec: All CLI commands serialize their output as JSON by default. Passing `--human` switches to a human-readable text format. The same underlying data object is rendered by two formatters; no command exposes a third format.
proposed_concepts.invariant: Every command produces machine-parseable JSON on stdout unless `--human` is set; stderr is reserved for diagnostics only.
proposed_concepts.rationale: Cross-cutting output contract that applies to every sub-command uniformly; not a discrete symbol and therefore cannot map to a single feature row.
